title: Straw Hats Hold the Line
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Nami, Unknown person #11, Usopp, Kid as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry I tried to kill you earlier!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive me, Nami, but you have to die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I was too cowardly to defy Mama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because I was too busy worrying about my own life!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What I did was pathetic and spineless!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whatever!! We have nothing to do with each other anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Now it's my turn to be discarded!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if this is the end, I don't want to die being hated by everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I under- stand if you can't forgive me, but please watch....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This will be my first and last act of defiance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The least I can do is try and make amends before I die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WELL THEN, HERA, EAT YOUR FILL!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Consider these black balls a parting gift!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Eat up and get away, ZEUS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry! My soul is damaged, so I don't think I'll be able to enjoy my favorite snack....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ho-Ho-Ho- I'm brimming with power now-o

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: usohachi- Kun! onami- chan! We have to run!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHY ARE YOU RUNNING AWAY FROM ME, OTAMA?`

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I HATE IT WHEN PEOPLE DESERT ME!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Do I have to kill you too?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 47 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
